title: Creative Refresh
description: Axiom + MagicWand + FAWE + 8 tools & in-game local server!
body:
Creative Refresh: Full professional suite featuring Axiom, **7 battle-tested plugins**, and a **groundbreaking new tool** that completes Axiom.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/c6hVQmQu2aQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[![Join us on Discord](https://gist.github.com/cxmeel/0dbc95191f239b631c3874f4ccf114e2/raw/discord.svg)](https://discord.gg/t56FghcUWS) [![Read the Documentation](https://gist.github.com/cxmeel/0dbc95191f239b631c3874f4ccf114e2/raw/docs.svg)](https://magicwand.gitbook.io/magicwand-wiki) [![Support on Patreon](https://gist.github.com/cxmeel/0dbc95191f239b631c3874f4ccf114e2/raw/patreon.svg)](https://www.patreon.com/c/BryanValc)

# Purpose

This pack exists because builders deserve access without paywalls, complexity or moderation – all credit to original creators.


# How it works


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Installs as a modpack with Axiom + QoL mods and a **portable self-hosted server**. Join the pre-configured "Singleplayer world" to access all tools instantly.

</details>




# Value

In this modpack, you get:
- **Axiom**, an in-game worldeditor studio.
- **7 essential plugins**.
- A new plugin **completing Axiom**.
- Zero setup and Self-hosted server.
- True privacy, nobody can steal your work.
- No staff controlling your **artistic/speech-freedom** (big servers are spying on your /msg commands, if your opinion is different they will ban you, they also ban people for speaking other languages).

Indirect benefits for the community:

<details>
<summary>See all benefits</summary>

- Paid servers must offer more value and fair monetization.
- Free servers unable to meet the demands shouldn't result in you not having all the tools.
- You get real privacy, if you turn on airplane mode everything keeps working.
- Engagement should be optional, if you don't feel like joining a Discord and align with its rules, you don't have to.

For all these reasons, consider keeping Discord RPC turned on so more Builders can find out about this professional suite.

</details>




# Key mods

- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) (world editing)
- [WorldEditCUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldedit-cui) (WorldEdit selection visualization)
- [WeCuiFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/wecuifix) (WorldEditCUI fix for 1.21.5)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) (paste works in local server)
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) (build inspection)
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) (recording)
- [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) (shader/texture management)
- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) (control accessibility)
- [Bridging Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bridging-mod) (Bedrock accessibility)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) (command tracking)


# Key plugins

- [MagicWand](https://modrinth.com/plugin/magicwand-building-plugin) Effortless Building PaperMC port (2x tools)
- [Axiom-Paper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/axiom-paper-plugin) (server Axiom support)
- [FAWE](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fastasyncworldedit) (fast WorldEdit + 200+ commands)
- [FAVS](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/favs) (VoxelSniper-based editing with 100 tools)
- [goPaint](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/gopaint.27717/) (GUI painting)
- [goBrush](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/gobrush.23118/) (GUI terraforming)
- [HeadDB](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/headdb.84967/) (100K+ heads)
- [BannerMaker](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/bannermaker.4380/) (custom banners)
- [ArmorStandTools](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/armor-stand-tools.2237/) (pose editing)


# Quick Start

- Install via Modrinth.
- Launch the game.
- Go to Singleplayer > Join existing world (Local Server).


<details>
<summary>Create more worlds</summary>

(Optional) Create new worlds: Singleplayer > Create World > More > Server Type > MagicWand.

</details>




# Important Notes

- **MagicWand**: Standalone SpigotMC plugin (works for Java/Bedrock). Not an Axiom add-on.
- **Permissions**: Secured from Moulberry (Axiom) and Arcaniax (goPaint/goBrush) to avoid conflicts, **they were approached first**.

# Redistribution and modification


<details>
<summary>See details</summary>

You may redistribute this modpack as-is, without any modifications. Creating derivative works is not permitted, mainly to avoid fragmentation of an already small community. You may create derivates for your own use alone or a group of friends. This modpack was created to make MagicWand — an excellent tool more accessible by packaging it in a simple, ready-to-use format.

If you genuinely want to contribute by adding a valuable mod, plugin or configuration, or if you're running a public server and would like to be featured in the modpack default server list, please join our Discord and open a support ticket.

</details>
